channel.title: Filtering on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Filtering on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: Discover and manage agent activity with new session filters
item.description:
GitHub Enterprise AI Controls and the agent control plane add new session filters to help enterprises find and manage agent activity.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Hierarchy view improvements and file uploads in issue forms
item.description:
GitHub Projects hierarchy view gained new improvements, including the ability to filter sub-issues using syntax. GitHub issue forms also added support for file uploads.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Improved performance for GitHub Actions workflows page
item.description:
The GitHub Actions workflows page now handles very large workflows (more than 300 jobs) by using lazy loading for smoother performance, and it also adds the ability to filter jobs to help navigate large workflows.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Review commit-by-commit, improved filtering, and more in the pull request “Files changed” public preview
item.description:
GitHub announced a public preview update to the pull request “Files changed” view that closes a major gap by adding review commit-by-commit, improves commit filtering, and includes other enhancements to make reviewing changes in PRs easier.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Azure VNet Flow Log - Filtering
item.description:
Azure announced a Public Preview that adds advanced filtering capabilities to VNet Flow Logs, which capture IP traffic through VNets, subnets, and NICs to support monitoring, troubleshooting, network optimization, security, and compliance.

  • Source: Azure Updates
